name: Baby Food Soft Doggie Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3 2 1/2 oz jars of baby food (either beef or chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Roll into small balls and place on a well-greased cookie sheet.
3. Flatten slightly with a fork.
4. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 15 minutes or until brown.
5. Cool on wire racks.
6. Store in the refrigerator. Also freezes well.
Notes:
Cream of wheat can be substituted for the wheat germ.
